settings.text: Everything you need to know about Lettii lamps — from battery life to returns. If you can't find your answer, get in touch.

settings.question: How long does the battery last?
settings.answer: Up to 12 hours on low brightness, around 6 hours on full. That's a full dinner party, an evening in the garden, or a few nights on your bedside table — all from one charge. Recharging takes 4-5 hours via USB-C.

settings.question: Is it bright enough to actually make a difference?
settings.answer: Yes. Lettii lamps produce warm, diffused light — the same quality you see in restaurants and boutique hotels. They won't light a room on their own (that's not what they're for), but they transform the atmosphere of any table, shelf, or corner. Stepless dimming means you set exactly the level you want.

settings.question: Can I use it outside? What if it rains?
settings.answer: Every Lettii lamp is rated IP54 — that's protection against splashing water from any direction. Use it on the patio, the garden table, the balcony. A passing rain shower won't cause any problems. We wouldn't recommend submerging it, but normal outdoor use is exactly what it's designed for.

settings.question: Will it look cheap or plasticky?
settings.answer: This is the question we obsessed over. Lettii lamps use premium materials with a weighted base and quality finish. They're designed to look like they belong in a boutique hotel, not a novelty shop. The photos on our site are accurate — what you see is what arrives.

settings.question: How does the dimming work?
settings.answer: Touch the top of the lamp to turn it on and off. Touch and hold to dim smoothly — up and down. No app. No remote. No buttons. Just touch.

settings.question: How do I charge it?
settings.answer: USB-C cable, same as most modern phones. Plug it in, leave it for 4-5 hours, and you're set for the evening. A small LED indicator shows charging status. Cable included with every lamp.

settings.question: Why should I pay more than an Amazon lamp?
settings.answer: Fair question. Amazon has cordless lamps for £15-25. They also have thin plastic bodies, cool-toned LEDs, short battery life, and no design coherence. Lettii sits between those and £100+ designer brands — premium materials, warm light, real design, and a brand that actually answers your emails. The 30-day guarantee means you can compare side by side, risk-free.

settings.question: How much is shipping?
settings.answer: Free standard UK shipping on orders over £50. Under £50, it's £3.95. Express next-day delivery is £5.95 on any order.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Standard delivery is 2-4 business days via Royal Mail or Evri. Express next-day delivery is available if you order before 2pm on a weekday.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Not yet — we're UK only at launch. International shipping is coming soon. Sign up for our newsletter and we'll let you know when it's available.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Yes. You'll receive a shipping confirmation email with a tracking link as soon as your order is dispatched. You can also check your order status anytime through your account page.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Klarna (pay in 3 instalments). All payments are processed securely.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: 30-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked. If you're not happy with your lamp for any reason, request a return within 30 days of delivery and we'll refund you in full.

settings.question: Is return shipping free?
settings.answer: Yes. We cover return shipping costs. You'll receive a prepaid return label — just pack the lamp, drop it off, and we handle the rest.

settings.question: How long does a refund take?
settings.answer: We process refunds within 5 business days of receiving the return. The refund goes back to your original payment method.

settings.question: Can I exchange for a different design or colour?
settings.answer: Absolutely. If you'd like a different lamp, just let us know when you request the return and we'll arrange the exchange. If the new item costs more, we'll send you a payment link for the difference.

settings.question: What if my lamp arrives damaged or faulty?
settings.answer: Get in touch immediately and we'll send a replacement — no need to wait for the return to arrive back. Email hello@lettii.co.uk with a photo of the damage and we'll sort it the same day.

settings.question: How do I clean my lamp?
settings.answer: Wipe with a soft, damp cloth. Avoid abrasive cleaners or solvents. The IP54 rating means it handles water splashes, but don't soak or submerge it.

settings.question: Can I leave it charging overnight?
settings.answer: Yes. The lamp has built-in overcharge protection — it stops drawing power once fully charged. No need to babysit it.

settings.question: How long will the battery last before it needs replacing?
settings.answer: The rechargeable battery is rated for 500+ full charge cycles. With typical use (charging 2-3 times per week), that's several years of life before any noticeable capacity reduction.

settings.question: Can I replace the bulb?
settings.answer: Lettii lamps use integrated LEDs — there's no bulb to replace. LED life is rated at 50,000+ hours. At 4 hours per day of use, that's over 30 years.

settings.heading: Still have a question?
settings.description: We reply to every email within 12 hours. Live chat is open 9am-6pm, Monday to Friday.
